title: Delete RunPod branch (local+remote), rename 1.2 -> 1.1
description: 1.2 is the continuation of the RunPod branch; RunPod-impacting bug fixes now live on 1.2. Eliminate the RunPod branch entirely (local + remote) and rename 1.2 -> 1.1. 1.1 becomes the next release after master later (OUT OF SCOPE here). No app-version change: this is a git-branch rename only, appVersion.js is NOT touched. Push is a user-authorized live op. See brief.md for exact steps + gates.
